title: phaseolus radiatus var. setulosus
intro: Phaseolus radiatus var. setulosus, also known as the hairy bean or hairy mung bean, is a type of bean that belongs to the family Fabaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits. The hairy bean is rich in nutrients and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive problems, fever, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the hairy bean can be consumed as a decoction, capsule, or powder, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
